ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot carefully pouring sake, emphasizing precision and reverence. The robot's movements will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the ritualistic nature of sake pouring.  The sequence will focus on the right arm, which will perform the pouring action. The left arm will remain in a supporting position for stability.  The right arm will start in a neutral position, move to a pouring position, then return to neutral. The wrist will be used to control the angle of the pour. Frame 1: The robot's arms are at rest. Frame 2: The robot's right arm reaches out and the wrist tilts slightly to begin the pour. Frame 3: The robot's right arm begins to pour the sake. Frame 4: The robot's right arm returns to its neutral position.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, ready for the ritual
right arm extends, wrist tilts to begin pouring
sake pours with careful, deliberate motion
right arm returns to rest, the pour complete
